## Validation

- [ ] `poetry run ruff check src tests branding`
- [ ] `poetry run pytest`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] No real personal data, CVs, cover letters, or application answers
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private domains, or deployment details
- [ ] Examples use synthetic candidates, roles, and companies
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
